.cursorrules.general_idea: Simplify the root .cursorrules file to act as a pointer to the canonical rules file and documentation, removing inline stack details and non-negotiable rules.
.cursorrules.before:
# EduCycle — Cursor Rules (compatibility fallback)
# Full rules: .cursor/rules/educycle.mdc
# Project notes & status: NOTES.md

## Stack
- Backend: Java 17 + Spring Boot 3.4.x + PostgreSQL + Flyway | default 8080; profile `docker` 8081 (Vite proxy dev mặc định 8081)
- Frontend: React 19 + Vite 7 + JavaScript + CSS Variables (tokens.css) | port 5173

## Non-negotiable rules
1. Status from backend is always UPPERCASE: "PENDING" "ACCEPTED" "APPROVED" "ADMIN" → use .toUpperCase() in FE
2. Flyway: migrations đến V11 trong repo — next V12, never edit existing migrations
3. Refresh token: SecureRandom 64 bytes — never UUID.randomUUID()
4. CSS: var(--token-name) only — never hardcode hex or px values
5. AuthContext: no mock fallback — throw real errors when backend is down
6. Git: never `git add .` — use Conventional Commits

.env.example.general_idea: Add configuration option for a dedicated HMAC secret for OTP generation, separating it from the JWT secret for better security in production.
Update CORS and frontend base URL examples to reflect production HTTPS settings and reference TLS documentation.
Remove hardcoded OAuth client IDs and complex authentication flow comments from the environment example file.
.env.example.before:
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=655696942996-23v3ded01q45mth3lufocjntei1mnfp9.apps.googleusercontent.com
MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID=26196491-b38e-48fb-b900-72c05aaec7c0
# Google đăng nhập — chọn một:
#   A) Auth-code (FE mặc định production / khi VITE_GOOGLE_OAUTH_USE_AUTH_CODE=true): bắt buộc secret
#      → Google Cloud Console → OAuth client → Client secret → đặt dưới đây (không commit repo thật).
#   B) Implicit (FE dev: source/frontend/.env.development đã VITE_GOOGLE_OAUTH_USE_AUTH_CODE=false):
#      → không cần dòng này; BE xác minh access_token qua tokeninfo.
# GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=your_client_secret_from_google_console
